title: 179  Train your mind to ask questions to Prabhupada
speaker: HDG Srila Prabhupada

segments.text: We have to understand Srila Prabhupada with his sincere followers.
Every follower of Prabhupada is very dear to Srila Prabhupada.
So we should learn, again, the level of respect, everything, nothing should be over or under.
That's the point.
You can never equate anybody with Srila Prabhupada, a disciple never equates in any aspects.
At the same time, he sees everybody, that's why the word is used, due respect.
We need to learn.
Anywhere we have to give due respect, even to a dog, even to an ant, there is a due respect.
To determine what is that due respect, you understand from Guru Sadhu and Shastra, what
is that due respect?
In our heart, what is that due respect?
We have to give due respect.
It is not that black and white, respect, no respect.
You know, I have respect or I have no respect.

It's a due respect for everybody.
Except for offenders.
You see offenders, especially offenders of pure devotees, their due respect is zero.
There is a due.

Vaikuntha Hill in your heart. We should build big projects in your heart. And what is a
big project? How to develop humility, how to develop relations with spiritual master,
with other devotees, with karmis, everybody, because ultimately you have to learn how to,
from Krishna's point of angle, from Krishna's point of view, how you should relate with
an ignorant person, to enlightened person.
To somebody who is very advanced, how to deal with him, everything we have to learn.
And that's the challenge and that's what we are here for. Sooner or later we have to learn.
Better we apply our mind and we learn. Once we learn that the process of relationship
is set up, very fast energy will flow through those relationships. Transcendental knowledge,
Vaishnava association, detachment, attachment to Krishna, all these things will follow. But
those connections have to be set. When the tube is not connected, the water won't flow.
Similarly the relationship has to be, the connection has to start. Starting with Prabhupada,
that connection has to start.
